nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: A red sports car parked on a coastal road begins rolling forward, camera tracking low beside the front wheel, ocean wind, tire sound, realistic reflections, no music.

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
- Huggingface: [dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4)
- Github: [LTX-2](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

## LTX-2.3 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Report LTX-2.3 Issues
To report LTX workflow issues, use [ComfyUI issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues) or the relevant MLX fork issue thread.

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**MLX model folders**

- [ltx-2.3-mlx-q4](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4) - default Q4 folder
- [ltx-2.3-mlx-q8](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q8) - Q8 folder
- [ltx-2.3-mlx](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx) - BF16 folder

**Q4 direct file links**

- [config.json](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/config.json)
- [split_model.json](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/split_model.json)
- [transformer-distilled-1.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/transformer-distilled-1.1.safetensors)
- [vae_decoder.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/vae_decoder.safetensors)
- [vae_encoder.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/vae_encoder.safetensors)
- [audio_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/audio_vae.safetensors)
- [vocoder.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/vocoder.safetensors)
- [connector.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/connector.safetensors)
- [spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1.safetensors)
- [spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1_config.json](https://huggingface.co/dgrauet/ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/resolve/main/spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1_config.json)

Q8 and BF16 use the same folder layout from their linked repos.

## Model Storage Location

```text
ComfyUI/
└── models/
    └── checkpoints/
        ├── ltx-2.3-mlx-q4/
        │   ├── config.json
        │   ├── split_model.json
        │   ├── transformer-distilled-1.1.safetensors
        │   ├── vae_decoder.safetensors
        │   ├── vae_encoder.safetensors
        │   ├── audio_vae.safetensors
        │   ├── vocoder.safetensors
        │   ├── connector.safetensors
        │   ├── spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1.safetensors
        │   └── spatial_upscaler_x2_v1_1_config.json
        ├── ltx-2.3-mlx-q8/
        └── ltx-2.3-mlx/
```

The same MLX folder is selected through readable aliases in the checkpoint, text encoder, audio VAE, and latent upscaler loaders. The stock torch LoRA and prompt-enhancement nodes are left visible but disabled; this MLX path uses `transformer-distilled-1.1.safetensors` directly.

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare the complete MLX folder under `models/checkpoints/`.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)


## I2V Defaults

This workflow uses the stock first-frame I2V graph path: `LoadImage -> LTXVImgToVideoInplace -> SamplerCustomAdvanced`, then repeats first-frame conditioning after the MLX latent upscaler before stage 2. Stage 1 and stage 2 both use random noise, with the stage 2 seed set to stage 1 seed + 2. The default MLX I2V path uses full first-frame strength so the preserved frame is treated as a clean image condition.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
